title: UnstableSMP DeathSound
description: A plugin that adds UnstableSMP death sounds to your game.
body:
# UnstableSMP DeathSound Plugin

Adds a custom UnstableSMP-style death sounds to your Minecraft server!

This plugin plays a death sound whenever a player dies.

### Features

🔊 Custom death sounds on player death

⚡ Lightweight and simple

🎮 Perfect for SMPs and PvP servers

👤 Toggle death sounds only for yourself with: /deathsound

✅ Client-side preference system

Command

```
/deathsound
```


Toggles death sounds on or off for yourself.
